vibe: Sophisticated, authoritative, minimalist, editorial. Think Tate Modern, Gagosian, or David Zwirner. The UI is completely silent; the colorful artworks are the heroes.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing & Asymmetry (Mode A: Tetris Grid). Do not center everything. Let negative space breathe.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 with 1px border-b border-white/10.
surface_strategies.cards_gallery: Cardless. Edge-to-edge images or solid minimalist borders (border-b only). Use hover state to reveal text/opacity.
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300.

components_instructions.navigation: Fixed top nav (z-50) with logo, links, EN/ES toggle, and Cart/Login. Must be visible on desktop (no hamburger on md+).
components_instructions.hero_section: Massive typography, pure black background, single featured artwork on one side (asymmetric) with scrolling marquee or very subtle parallax.
components_instructions.gallery_grid: Asymmetric masonry or bento grid. Images are the ONLY color on the page. Use 'group' and 'group-hover' to show details on hover.
components_instructions.artwork_detail_page: Sticky layout: Massive image on the left (col-span-8) max-h-[80vh] object-contain, sticky details on the right (col-span-4) with Title, Year, Technique, Description, and Buy button (Stripe checkout).
components_instructions.exhibitions_list: Minimalist list view. Huge typography. border-t border-white/10 between rows.
components_instructions.admin_panel: Dense, utilitarian. Table views for managing artworks and exhibitions. Use Shadcn UI (dark mode).
components_instructions.language_switcher: Simple text toggle 'EN / ES' in the header. Use standard i18n approach.

motion_and_interactions.general: Smooth and slow. No bouncy animations. The vibe is a silent museum.
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll is mandatory for the premium gallery feel.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Images scale up very slightly (scale-105) inside a hidden overflow container. Text fades in.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='buy-artwork-button', data-testid='lang-toggle', data-testid='admin-login'.

artist_portrait.description: Black and white editorial portrait of the artist for the bio section.

exhibition_space.description: Minimalist modern art exhibition space for the upcoming exhibitions section.
